checkin.journal:
Slept until 5, then my stomach was going crazy - pulse was elevated
Getting ready for the day
Figured I want to first do another antibiotic cleansing and only then FMT
Shooting in Valletta with guys
Got antibiotics from Malta doctor - god bless him
Shooting at the office
We traveled to Golden bay shot on the way in van
We then shot in Golden bay, and popped champaign and swam
Its weird, pain moved up like now its in the stomach. Day was shooting time and it was great.
Inspired by: how easy the g
